title: Turkish-Style Pide Noodle Soup
description: A hearty and comforting soup made with Turkish spices, pide noodles, and a hint of malty sweetness.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the Turkish red pepper flakes, if using, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the vegetable broth, malty brown sugar, and dried thyme. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Add the pide noodles to the pot and cook according to package instructions, or until al dente.
Season the soup with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh thyme, if desired.
